scrolls.title: Summoning Scrolls
scrolls.subtitle: Summon a boss · defeat within 14 days · claim unique loot
scrolls.modal_consequence: Fail — scroll is lost. Win — receive unique loot.

misted_wanderer.name: Misted Wanderer
misted_wanderer.quote: "You cannot find what you cannot see."

herald_jackal.name: Jackal's Howl
herald_jackal.quote: "I herald only one thing — your end."

ink_warden.name: Ink Mark
ink_warden.quote: "Every word written is a chain forged."

weaving_shade.name: Spinning Silk
weaving_shade.quote: "Every thread is a trap I've already set."

ember_smith.name: Forge Wrath
ember_smith.quote: "I forge weapons. You are merely the ore."

sanctuary_weeper.name: Sanctuary's Tear
sanctuary_weeper.quote: "I weep not for you, but for what I must do."

shallow_leviathan.name: Black Tide
shallow_leviathan.quote: "The ocean does not drown — it invites."

faceless_king.name: Ashen Name
faceless_king.quote: "I have no face because I am everyone's fear."

ore_golem.name: Mine's Groan
ore_golem.quote: "The mountain does not fall. It buries."

wounded_moon.name: Lunar Scar
wounded_moon.quote: "Even a wound becomes a crown if you survive it."

choir_forgotten.name: Forgotten Choir
choir_forgotten.quote: "We sing the names of those erased by time."

bottomless_miser.name: Abyssal Greed
bottomless_miser.quote: "There is never enough. Not gold. Not time. Not you."

winter_thorn.name: Winter's Thorn
winter_thorn.quote: "Beauty and ruin wear the same face."

king_ashen_throne.name: Ashen Throne
king_ashen_throne.quote: "Every throne is built on someone's grave. Yours will be no different."

eclipse_warden.name: Eclipse Eye
eclipse_warden.quote: "I do not block the light. I consume it."

nameless_god.name: Nameless God
nameless_god.quote: "I was worshipped before language existed. I will remain after it ends."

final_dusk.name: Final Dusk
final_dusk.quote: "This is not the end of the world. It is the end of yours."

setup.title: Initialize MIND OS
setup.description: Enter your current scores and genetic ceiling estimates. These set your starting point — you can update them later.
setup.failed_init: Failed to initialize system. Please try again.

skill_tree.title: Organic Skill Tree
skill_tree.respec_desc: All {{count}} nodes will be reset. SP refunded.
skill_tree.preset_desc: Saves your current {{count}} unlocked nodes. Max 3 presets.

achievements.you_died: 💀 YOU DIED! Rank demoted. HP restored.

dashboard.premium_desc: Unlock advanced tools, new character classes, and support development.
dashboard.session_expired_desc: Your session may have expired. Please log in again if this persists.
dashboard.no_dailies: No dailies yet. Add a routine!
dashboard.no_todos: No to-dos yet. Add a quest!
dashboard.no_sessions_sub: Start training to build your history.

privacy.title: PRIVACY
privacy.rivalDesc: Allow others to see you as a rival candidate
privacy.anonDesc: Hide your name in leaderboards and rival lists
privacy.analyticsDesc: Help improve MIND OS with anonymous usage data
privacy.dataCollected: Data collected when analytics is ON:
privacy.dataSecureInfo: No personal identifiers are sent. Data is anonymized and used only for product improvements.

reset_panel.title: RESET
reset_panel.training_desc: Resets all logged sessions and restores hidden activities to Rank F. Cognitive stats (Gf/Gc/Ps/Vm) are preserved.
reset_panel.streak_desc: Resets your current streak to 0. Does not affect other progress.
reset_panel.tasks_desc: Deletes all habits, dailies, and to-dos. This cannot be undone.
reset_panel.allies_desc: Locks all unlocked allies. Bond progress will be lost.
reset_panel.skilltree_desc: Resets all skill tree unlocks and refunds your SP.
reset_panel.stats_desc: Resets cognitive stats, rank, gold, and class. This cannot be undone.
reset_panel.nuclear_desc: Permanently deletes ALL data including tasks, logs, stats, and inventory. This cannot be undone.

errorBoundary.renderError: Something went wrong rendering this tab.

partyTab.completeTaskFeed: Complete a task to start the feed!
partyTab.completeToClimb: Complete tasks and habits to climb the ranks!
partyTab.inviteDesc: Share this with friends to invite them.
partyTab.noXpYet: No XP earned yet this week.

boss_panel.visit_scrolls: Visit SCROLLS tab to summon one

architect.name: Architect
architect.lore: Builds systems. Thinks in structures. Never improvises. Passive: +20% XP on Sciences category sessions.

ascetic.name: Ascetic
ascetic.lore: Forges the will through suffering. Pain is the teacher. Passive: +20% XP on Spirit category sessions.

linguist.name: Linguist
linguist.lore: Languages are keys. Every key opens a different mind. Passive: +20% XP on Languages category sessions.

warlord.name: Warlord
warlord.lore: The body is the weapon. Discipline is the ammunition. Passive: +20% XP on Body category sessions.

blueprint.name: Blueprint
blueprint.desc: Next 3 tasks logged give +50% Rank XP until midnight.

system_overload.name: System Overload
system_overload.desc: Deal 3× damage to current boss on next task completion.

infinite_loop.name: Infinite Loop
infinite_loop.desc: All sessions in next 2 hours count double for cognitive metrics.

iron_fast.name: Iron Fast
iron_fast.desc: For 24h: each task restores 5 HP. Missed dailies deal 0 HP damage.

meditation.name: Meditation
meditation.desc: For 12h: other skills cost 50% less mana, next 3 focus sessions get +30% Focus Rating.

transcendence.name: Transcendence
transcendence.desc: For 48h: streak cannot break. Rival XP frozen.

babel_mode.name: Babel Mode
babel_mode.desc: Next language session counts across all three language subjects.

polyglot_surge.name: Polyglot Surge
polyglot_surge.desc: Push all language subject ranks forward by 2 virtual hours each.

memetic_transfer.name: Memetic Transfer
memetic_transfer.desc: For 24h: Gc and Vm gains also mirror as Gf gains at 50% rate.

war_cry.name: War Cry
war_cry.desc: Reduce boss HP by 10% and stun boss for 1h.

tactical_retreat.name: Tactical Retreat
tactical_retreat.desc: Reset boss encounter, gain 25% max mana back.

sharp_focus.name: Sharp Focus
sharp_focus.desc: Sessions with Focus 8+ give +10% bonus Rank XP

flow_state.name: Flow State
flow_state.desc: First session each day gives 1.5× Rank XP

godmind.name: Godmind
godmind.desc: IQ score contributes 0.5× to Rank XP per session

iron_conditioning.name: Iron Conditioning
iron_conditioning.desc: Exercise and Running give +15% Rank XP

pain_threshold.name: Pain Threshold
pain_threshold.desc: Missed daily HP loss reduced by 25%

market_knowledge.name: Market Knowledge
market_knowledge.desc: Selling items gives 60% of buy price

golden_mind.name: Golden Mind
golden_mind.desc: Sessions over 2h give a guaranteed loot drop

aura_of_focus.name: Aura of Focus
aura_of_focus.desc: Allies gain +10% to their stat bonuses

transcendent_will.name: Transcendent Will
transcendent_will.desc: Rival advancement speed reduced by 10% permanently

void_clarity.name: Void Clarity
void_clarity.desc: Once per week: use any active skill at 0 mana cost

polymath.name: Polymath
polymath.desc: Logging 3+ subjects in one day gives +20 bonus XP

cross_training.name: Cross-Training
cross_training.desc: Language sessions give 30% of hours to Humanities ranks

encyclopedia.name: Encyclopedia
encyclopedia.desc: Gc gains increased by 20% from all sources

living_library.name: Living Library
living_library.desc: Reading/Philosophy sessions advance you faster vs rival

omniscience.name: Omniscience
omniscience.desc: All 5 metrics gain +0.3 flat on each achievement unlock

master.name: Master
master.desc: Reach B rank in any subject

grandmaster.name: Grandmaster
grandmaster.desc: Reach SSS rank in any subject

loan_shark.name: Loan Shark
loan_shark.desc: Borrow future gold for a steep price.

double_nothing.name: Double or Nothing
double_nothing.desc: 50% chance for double rewards or nothing.

cursed_clock.name: Cursed Clock
cursed_clock.desc: Time moves faster, but so do deadlines.

deja_vu.name: Deja Vu
deja_vu.desc: Repeat past tasks for current rewards.

mirror_match.name: Mirror Match
mirror_match.desc: 30% chance on completion to autocomplete another task of the same category for 50% reward.

alchemist.name: Alchemist
alchemist.desc: At daily reset, converts all unspent Mana into Gold (1 Mana = 2 Gold).

time_dilation.name: Time Dilation
time_dilation.desc: Sessions require a minimum of 2.0 hours to submit, but grant 3.0x XP and Gold.

sacrificial_altar.name: Sacrificial Altar
sacrificial_altar.desc: Permanently delete a completed Habit/Daily (min 7d old or streak 5+) for a large reward.

twin_souls.name: Twin Souls
twin_souls.desc: Directs 15% of all XP and Gold to the active ally with the lowest XP received.

inversion.name: Inversion
inversion.desc: Flips focus quality: low focus yields high rewards, high focus yields low rewards.

gamblers_ledger.name: Gamblers Ledger
gamblers_ledger.desc: Gold from tasks is stored in a ledger and paid out at weekly reset with a +50% bonus.

parasite.name: Parasite
parasite.desc: Doubles the effect of all active XP and Gold mutators (bonuses and penalties).

null_zone.name: Null Zone
null_zone.desc: Fully disables XP gain, converting 100% of earned XP into Gold at 1 XP = 0.5 Gold.

chronomancer.name: Chronomancer
chronomancer.desc: Banks a missed day (once every 14 days) to preserve your streak and finish tasks later.

guest.mode_banner: Guest Mode — Your progress is saved only on this device.
guest.upgrade_desc: Secure your progress permanently. Full accounts can access premium features, cross-device sync, and community leaderboards.

notifications_panel.reminder_desc: Receive a daily reminder to complete your tasks
notifications_panel.channel_desc: Choose how you want to receive notifications

mutators_ui.ironman_desc: If HP reaches 0 — prestige will be forcefully activated. This cannot be undone. In exchange: all Rank XP +15% permanently.

focus_stim.name: Focus Stim
focus_stim.desc: Grants +30% Focus multiplier for your next Focus Session.

memory_patch.name: Memory Patch
memory_patch.desc: Instantly boosts your Growth Coefficient (Gc) by +0.2.

boss_damage_plus.name: Boss Damage+
boss_damage_plus.desc: Deals +50% damage to the boss in your next Focus Session.

xp_booster.name: XP Booster
xp_booster.desc: Grants +50% XP from all sources for 24 hours.

streak_shield.name: Streak Shield
streak_shield.desc: Automatically protects your daily streak from breaking once if you miss a day.

elixir.name: Elixir of Life
elixir.desc: Restores HP to 100% and grants 10 minutes of complete damage immunity.

yuki.name: YUKI
yuki.title: The Witch Bride
yuki.lore: She guards the threshold between effort and destiny.
levels: All Rank XP gains +8% globally
Mana max +20 permanently
Prestige bonus increased by +5%
Skill tree node costs -25%
After prestige: start at Rank C instead of F

void.name: VOID
void.title: The Abyss Walker
void.lore: He feeds on the time you waste.
levels: Boss damage +15%
Missed habit penalty reduced by 50%
Passive HP regen +5 per day
Critical strike chance +10% vs bosses
Once per week: skip a daily without breaking streak

hex.name: HEX
hex.title: The Cursed One
hex.lore: Knowledge always comes at a price.
levels: Gold gains +10%
Random chance to double task rewards
Shop discount 10%
Chance to find random consumable on completing a Hard task
Once per month: reset a skill tree node for free

kira.name: KIRA
kira.title: The Analyst
kira.lore: Data never lies, but it doesn't always tell the truth.
levels: Focus sessions grant +15% Mana
Increased loot drop chance from bosses
Unlocks detailed statistics on Dashboard
Coding tasks give +20% Rank XP
Once per day: instantly complete any one habit

sakura.name: SAKURA
sakura.title: The Pink Phantom
levels: Increases Speed (SPD) by +3
Running/Exercise tasks yield +20% Gold
Chance to dodge damage when missing a task
Increases Max Mana by 10
Skill activations cost 5 less Mana

nene.name: NENE
nene.title: The Silent Scholar
nene.lore: A smile that carries the weight of a thousand books.
levels: Prayer/Meditation sessions give +15% Rank XP
Logging 3+ subjects/day gives +30G bonus
HP restored +2 per day passively
All cognitive metric gains +10%
Once per week: full mana restoration for free

neko.name: NEKO
neko.title: The Dreamer
neko.lore: Sleeps on keyboards, wakes up for innovation.
levels: Increases Luck (LCK) by +5
Chance to get double XP for creative tasks
Passive Mana regen +1 per hour
Reduces Boss Damage taken by 10%
Once per day: get a random beneficial buff

luna.name: LUNA
luna.title: The Cat Spirit
luna.lore: She walks where the shadows are deep.
levels: Increases Memory (MEM) by +4
Reading tasks give +25% Mana
Increases chance of critical task success
Bonus XP for late-night sessions
Hides one failed task from breaking streak

grier.name: GRIER
grier.title: The Iron Warden
grier.lore: True progress is forged in absolute resilience.
levels: Focus >= 9.0 restores +2 HP but gives -25% Gold
Failed tasks trigger Shield Slam (prevents 50% HP damage, deals that damage to boss for 5 Mana)
Increases Max HP by 40, but reduces Speed (SPD) by 4 permanently
Failed tasks add Revenge charges (max 3); next completion consumes charges to deal +50% boss damage each
Below 20% HP: immune to missed daily HP damage, double task boss damage, but disables mana regeneration

lyra.name: LYRA
lyra.title: The Chrono-Weaver
lyra.lore: She weaves strands of time to extend perfect concentration.
levels: Focus sessions >2h give +30% Rank XP, but <30m give 0 rewards
Once per day: Revert a task to restore HP lost without losing XP/Gold
Logging focus session forces Focus = 10.0 for first 30m, decays by 1.5 every 15m
Reduces active skill cooldowns by 1h per 1.0h of logged focus sessions
Once per day: Completing a Daily duplicates rewards and boss damage of next 3 completed Todos at cost of 50% current Mana

meldor.name: MELDOR
meldor.title: The Plague Doctor
meldor.lore: He turns failures and waste into hazardous mutagenic power.
levels: Completing a Todo has 10% chance to drop random ingredient but costs 2 HP
Increases active mutators' effects/penalties by +25% flat (+100% and +25% flat stacked with Parasite, max 5x cap)
Salvaging/selling items has a 10% chance to yield a crafting ingredient instead of gold
Active mutator expiration deals 200 boss damage at cost of 15 Mana
Completing a Hard task has 15% chance to duplicate item dropped, but item sales yield 0 Gold

kage.name: KAGE
kage.title: The Shadow Stalker
kage.lore: He strikes from the blind spots of your habits.
levels: Critical hit damage increased to x3.0, but base critical chance is halved
Completing a Todo deals +40 boss damage but yields 0 Gold
Critical hits restore +8 HP/MP, but normal hits deal 1 HP damage to you
When HP drops to 0: prevents death, restores 20 HP, and stuns boss for 4h (24h cooldown)
5x damage to boss below 15% HP, but task failure deals 50% more damage to you

zephyr.name: ZEPHYR
zephyr.title: The Wandering Bard
zephyr.lore: His melodies synchronize with your focus cycles.
levels: Logging different focus subject gives +20% Rank XP
Streak of 10+ days increases all core stats by +2
Boosts all other active allies' perks by +15% (ally_stat_mult +0.15)
Every 4th task completed in a day grants a free chest, but tasks 1-3 yield -15% gold
Completing all active Dailies in a day deals 600 boss damage and restores full mana

bran.name: BRAN
bran.title: The Scrap Tinker
bran.lore: He cobbles scrap metal into mechanical wonders.
levels: +8% item drop chance on tasks, but -10% Rank XP gains
Reduces gold cost of all shop items and loot chests by 15%
Salvaging/selling equipment yields double gold and 20% ingredient drop chance
+30% equipped gear stat bonuses, but lose 1 HP for every skill activated
Opening a Loot Chest has a 12% chance to refund its Gold cost entirely

vivian.name: VIVIAN
vivian.title: The Blood Priestess
vivian.lore: She converts your vital blood into raw magical energy.
levels: Activate skills using HP instead of Mana (1 HP = 2 Mana), but disables healing from shop potions
Lose 15 HP to reset a random skill cooldown (12h cooldown)
Task completion heals +2 HP per 10% missing health
Task completion heals you for 10% of damage dealt to the boss
At exactly 1 HP: 100% critical hit chance and double XP gains

rhea.name: RHEA
rhea.title: The Void Explorer
rhea.lore: She maps space that does not exist.
levels: With active mutator: shuffles stats every hour (+20% sum)
Once per day: Swap an active mutator with a random one from the pool
Gravity Well: extends daily deadline by 4h (to 4 AM) but missing them deals +30% HP damage
Task completion pulls boss HP down by 1.5% max HP at cost of 2 Mana
Increases max active mutators limit from 3 to 4, at cost of -30 permanent Max HP

guides.description: Replay any of the introductory guides for the various sections of MIND OS.

about.description: MIND OS is a gamified productivity system that combines cognitive training with RPG mechanics. Track habits, complete daily tasks, defeat bosses, and level up your character while improving your real-life cognitive abilities.

features.metrics: Cognitive metric tracking (GF, GC, PS, VM)

about.support2: You can send a donation via PayPal to: kubsonpage3@gmail.com

tasks.title: Complete Tasks
tasks.description: Check off Habits and Dailies to deal damage to the active Boss.

training.title: Log Training
training.description: Train subjects to increase cognitive metrics and earn XP.

character.title: Level Up Character
character.description: Unlock permanent stat bonuses in the Skill Tree with SP.

shop.title: Equip Gear & Allies
shop.description: Spend Gold in the Shop to boost your stats and bonuses.

ranks.title: Climb the Ranks
ranks.description: Stay consistent to rank up from F to SSS and prestige for permanent bonuses.

dashboard.title: Cognitive Metrics
dashboard.body:
Intelligence research has long treated 'IQ' as a single number, but the modern view (Cattell-Horn-Carroll theory, the current mainstream model) breaks it into distinct abilities that grow somewhat independently. This app tracks four of them:
• Gf (Fluid Intelligence) — reasoning through new problems you haven't seen before.
• Gc (Crystallized Intelligence) — accumulated knowledge you can recall and apply.
• Ps (Processing Speed) — how fast you execute routine mental work.
• Vm (Verbal Memory) — holding and retrieving language-based information.
Each one responds to different activities (Math trains Gf, Reading trains Gc), and each has a ceiling with diminishing returns as you approach it — real skill growth slows the better you get, so consistency beats intensity.

training.title: Training
training.body: Log a session for any subject to earn XP, Gold, and gains in the specific Cognitive Metrics that activity targets — the coefficients aren't arbitrary, they reflect which mental skill each subject actually exercises. The suggestion banner points you toward whatever's currently weak or low-effort, which matters most on days you're tempted to skip training entirely — a short session in a low-energy-friendly subject still moves the needle.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.body:
• Habits — repeatable, no deadline. Just + or − whenever you do (or don't do) the thing.
• Dailies — scheduled and consequential: miss one and it costs real HP, which is what keeps them from feeling optional.
• To-Dos — one-time. Complete it, get rewarded, it's gone.
All three route XP and Gold into your character, and where relevant, into your Cognitive Metrics.

character.title: Character
character.body: Your class defines your identity and comes with 3 Active Skills — deliberate, Mana-costed tools you trigger for a burst effect at the right moment, not passive background bonuses. Gear you equip adds flat stat bonuses (PWR, DEF, FOC, MEM, SPD, LCK), each tied to a concrete gameplay effect shown right under its name. The stats table breaks down exactly where every point comes from — Class + Equipment + Base — so nothing about your character is hidden math.

skill_tree.title: Skill Tree
skill_tree.body: A grid of permanent, passive bonuses across 5 branches — Mind, Body, Wealth, Spirit, Knowledge — unlocked with Skill Points rather than Gold alone. You earn SP mainly by defeating Bosses, which is the real link in this system: your daily task completions chip away at a Boss's HP, and beating it converts that effort into lasting character growth instead of a one-time reward.

allies.title: Allies
allies.body: Companions you recruit with Gold, each passively boosting a specific kind of activity rather than a broad stat — one might strengthen Science sessions, another might boost Gold from Dailies. Leveling an Ally up unlocks stronger, more specific versions of their bonus, so your roster ends up shaped around whatever you actually train most.

mutators.title: Mutators
mutators.body: Optional modifiers that reshape how you play. Each one gives a real bonus AND takes something back — nothing here is free, by design. You can have up to 3 active at once, so every choice is a genuine tradeoff: concentrate everything into one subject with a strong bonus/penalty pair, or spread smaller bonuses across the board for less risk. Some Mutators are marked as Synergy pairs — equip both together and their combined effect is stronger than either alone.

shop.title: Shop
shop.body: Spend Gold on Gear (permanent stat bonuses), Consumables (one-time effects), and Scrolls (special limited-time boosts). Boss-drop unique items never appear here — those only come from actually defeating the specific boss they're tied to, so a full Inventory says something real about what you've beaten, not just what you could afford.

rival.title: Rival
rival.body: Johan is an AI-driven rival tracking a parallel version of your stats and commenting on your activity as you go. The weekly comparison table shows precisely where you're ahead or behind on hours, focus, subjects, and Rank XP — a source of light competitive pressure that works even if you're training completely alone.

party.title: Party
party.body: Team up with real friends using a shared invite code. Everyone in your Party can see each other's rank, level, streak, class, and HP — no shared boss, no chat, just visibility. The idea is simple: progress you can't show anyone is easier to quietly abandon than progress your friends can actually see.

prestige.title: Prestige Available!
prestige.description: You've reached maximum rank! Prestige now to earn a permanent XP multiplier.

no_boss.title: No Active Boss
no_boss.description: You have no active boss. Summon one in the Shop so your tasks deal damage!

unspent_sp.title: Unspent Skill Points
unspent_sp.description: You have unspent Skill Points. Visit the Skill Tree to permanently boost your stats.

dailies_risk.title: Streak at Risk
dailies_risk.description: Watch out! You have incomplete Dailies. Finish them before midnight to avoid taking damage.

no_mutators.title: No Active Mutators
no_mutators.description: Mutators trade risk for higher rewards. Equip one in the Shop to accelerate your progress.

no_allies.title: Empty Party
no_allies.description: You're fighting alone! Recruit an Ally to passively boost your training sessions.

excess_gold.title: Gold Piling Up
excess_gold.description: Your gold is piling up! Spend it on better gear or consumables in the Shop.

rival_discovery.title: Meet Your Rival
rival_discovery.description: Check out the Rival tab to see how you stack up against Johan.

feature_lock.title: Feature Locked
feature_lock.subtitle: Reach Rank {{rank}} to unlock the {{feature}}.
feature_lock.hint: Complete tasks and focus sessions to gain Rank XP
